Perfect! The transformations look correct. Let me create a final summary showing the file paths of all modified files:
## Summary
I successfully performed systematic renames across the entire codebase using LibCST:
### Transformations Applied:
1. **`PlanBackend` → `ManagedPrBackend`** 2. **`PlannedPRBackend` → `GitHubManagedPrBackend`**
### Files Modified: 70 total
**Key Changes:** - Class definitions renamed - All imports updated - Type annotations updated - isinstance checks updated - Docstrings and comments updated - String literals in comments updated
**Preserved (as required):** - ✓ Serialization name `"github-draft-pr"` in `get_provider_name()` - ✓ Package/directory name `plan_store` - ✓ Method names (out of scope)
### File Breakdown:
**Core Definitions (2 files):** - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/plan_store/backend.py` - ABC definition - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/plan_store/planned_pr.py` - Implementation
**Source Files (8 files):** - `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/*.py` (7 files) - `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py` - `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/metadata_helpers.py` - `src/erk/core/context.py` - `src/erk/core/plan_context_provider.py`
**Shared Package Files (7 files):** - `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/context/*.py` (2 files) - `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/plan_store/*.py` (4 files) - `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/learn/tracking.py`
**Test Files (46 files):** - `tests/unit/plan_store/*.py` - `tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/*.py` (many files) - `tests/commands/*.py` (multiple directories) - `tests/test_utils/*.py` - `tests/fakes/tests/shared_context.py`
### Verification: ✓ Zero remaining references to old class names ✓ 438 references to new class names found ✓ All Python files parse successfully ✓ Serialization name preserved
**Status: Success ✓**
